title: spermacoce manikensis
intro: Spermacoce manikensis, also known as the Maniken Spermacoce, is a plant species that belongs to the Rubiaceae family, characterized by its small, fragrant flowers and leaves with pointed tips. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities. The plant's health benefits include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Spermacoce manikensis can be prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or powder, which are used to treat various health conditions in traditional medicine.
